calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-20-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-20-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Henry Shain, Esq., for Plaintiff: Grosvenov Properties, LTD.
No appearance by the Defendant: Joel Hunt.
09:30 am. - Plaintiff's witness, Shauna Matlin was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Lease agreement ------------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - Three day notice ------------------ ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at: 1690 Broadway, Apt. 513, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $2,969.66
Costs of $211.10
For the total of $3,180.76
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Henry Howard Shain, Esq. for Plaintiff
Dan Croley, Property Manager for Plaintiff, Grosvenor Properties
Joel Hunt, Defendant in propria persona

Unlawful detainer settlement conference held. Case did not settle. Trial date remains
JPT: Gen Fujioka Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott Not reported. (504A)
